text:
Supply and installation of integral waterproofing, DPC, membrane for Hotel at Airport Road as per the drawings and specifications. All works to be completed as per IS codes and good practice.

BILL OF QUANTITIES

S.No  Description  Qty  Unit  Rate  Amount
1  Provide and lay Class C fly ash brick 6mm diameter  106  nos  1912  12094
2  Supply flush door  287  ls  2529  25060
3  Supply and fix membrane  487  rmt  1696  41635
4  Supply and fix Fe500 GI sheet  145  ltr  253  40486
5  Apply GI conduit 6mm diameter  306  ltr  329  5282
6  Apply Class 2 putty 25mm thick  372  rmt  4872  7569
7  Plaster PVC pipe 100 x 100mm  349  set  3915  35536
8  Provide and lay M20 M25 concrete  116  ls  4495  49052
9  Supply and fix Class A brick masonry 150 x 150mm  427  nos  3773  99514
10  Provide and install MS door 300mm thick  112  rmt  176  18864
11  Provide and fix brickbat coba  215  sqm  1981  3879
12  Provide and lay Fe415 MS plate 230mm thick  219  set  3604  60807

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

1. MATERIALS
   All materials shall be of best quality conforming to relevant Indian Standards.
   The contractor shall submit samples of all materials for approval before use.

2. WORKMANSHIP
   All works shall be carried out as per IS codes and good construction practice.
   The engineer-in-charge shall have the right to reject any defective material or workmanship.

3. TESTING
   All materials shall be tested as per relevant IS codes.
   Test certificates from NABL accredited labs shall be submitted.


GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS

1. Payment: 80% advance on materials at site, balance within 15 days of completion.
2. Completion: Within 60 days from date of work order.
3. Validity: Quotation valid for 90 days from submission date.
4. Warranty: Defects arising within 12 months from completion shall be rectified free of cost.
5. Taxes: GST extra as applicable.
